source: Phase 2b: added databricks_catalog + databricks_sql_endpoint, schema confirmed via Terraform MCP (databricks/databricks v1.121.0) -- both support provider_config{workspace_id} same as metastore_assignment, no aliased provider needed
provider_version: databricks/databricks >= 1.0 (schema confirmed against v1.121.0 via Terraform MCP smoke test, 2026-07-08/09)
notes: v3: catalog_name (default empty, skip) and create_sql_warehouse (default false) toggles, justified by two real facts from Autoresearch's config/lock.toml (execution=warehouse, catalog=healthdata) -- catalog_name is a plain input, no Autoresearch-specific value hardcoded. Known: creating databricks_catalog removes the auto-created 'default' schema (provider's own documented behavior) -- schema/table setup is application-level, not this module's job. provider_config account-level pattern for both new resources rides the same not-yet-live-proven assumption as metastore_assignment (HANDOFF.md Sec 6 item 10).
